attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SMIID.INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY AS INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY, 
NSLO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SMIID.SK_DEMAND_ID_INT AS SK_DEMAND_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
( CASE WHEN NIID.INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY   IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM  
 (
   SELECT DEMAND_ID , GLOBAL_NAME, DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE
  FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_DEMAND 
     UNION ALL
   SELECT DEMAND_ID ,  GLOBAL_NAME , DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE   
   FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_ITM_SLINE
     ) STMD
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMD.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND SMIID
ON (SMIID.SK_DEMAND_ID_INT = STMD.DEMAND_ID
AND SMIID.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ECXOOL
ON ECXOOL.LINE_ID = STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE
AND ECXOOL.GLOBAL_NAME = STMD.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSLO
 ON (COALESCE(ECXOOL.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID, ECXOOL.LINE_ID)=NSLO.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
  AND  (CASE WHEN ECXOOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN 'QTC'
   WHEN ECXOOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN 'BV' ELSE 'CG' END) = NSLO.SS_CODE /* Added ELSE 'CG' As part of SC LSS Q3FY14*/
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_INV_ITEM_DEMAND_SO_LINE NIID
ON ( NIID.SK_DEMAND_ID_INT = STMD.DEMAND_ID
AND  NIID.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  )

SELECT STMD.DEMAND_ID, STMD.ORGANIZATION_ID, STMD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE, STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STMD.UOM_CODE, 
STMD.LINE_ITEM_QUANTITY, STMD.PRIMARY_UOM_QUANTITY, STMD.COMPLETED_QUANTITY,
 STMD.REQUIREMENT_DATE, STMD.RESERVATION_TYPE, STMD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
 STMD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STMD.CREATION_DATE, STMD.CREATED_BY, 
 STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE, STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_DELIVERY, 
 STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_NAME, STMD.LINE_ITEM_RESERVATION_QTY, 
 STMD.RESERVATION_QUANTITY, STMD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STMD.REQUEST_ID, STMD.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, 
 STMD.PROGRAM_ID, STMD.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STMD.PARENT_DEMAND_ID, STMD.EXTERNAL_SOURCE_CODE, 
 STMD.EXTERNAL_SOURCE_LINE_ID, STMD.USER_LINE_NUM, STMD.USER_DELIVERY, STMD.SCHEDULE_ID, 
 STMD.AUTODETAIL_GROUP_ID, STMD.SUPPLY_SOURCE_TYPE, STMD.SUPPLY_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STMD.SUPPLY_GROUP_ID, 
 STMD.UPDATED_FLAG, STMD.REVISION, STMD.LOT_NUMBER, STMD.SERIAL_NUMBER, STMD.SUBINVENTORY, 
 STMD.LOCATOR_ID, STMD.COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID, STMD.PARENT_COMPONENT_SEQ_ID, STMD.RTO_MODEL_SOURCE_LINE, 
 STMD.RTO_PREVIOUS_QTY, STMD.CONFIG_STATUS, STMD.AVAILABLE_TO_MRP, STMD.AVAILABLE_TO_ATP, 
 STMD.ESTIMATED_RELEASE_DATE, STMD.DEMAND_CLASS, STMD.ROW_STATUS_FLAG, STMD.ORDER_CHANGE_REPORT_FLAG, 
 STMD.ATP_LEAD_TIME, STMD.EXPLOSION_EFFECTIVITY_DATE, STMD.BOM_LEVEL, STMD.MRP_DATE, STMD.MRP_QUANTITY, 
 STMD.CUSTOMER_ID, STMD.TERRITORY_ID, STMD.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STMD.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STMD.MASTER_RESERVATION_QTY, 
 STMD.DESCRIPTION, STMD.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STMD.ATTRIBUTE1, STMD.ATTRIBUTE2, STMD.ATTRIBUTE3, 
 STMD.ATTRIBUTE4, STMD.ATTRIBUTE5, STMD.ATTRIBUTE6, STMD.ATTRIBUTE7, STMD.ATTRIBUTE8, STMD.ATTRIBUTE9, 
 STMD.ATTRIBUTE10, STMD.ATTRIBUTE11, STMD.ATTRIBUTE12, STMD.ATTRIBUTE13, STMD.ATTRIBUTE14, 
 STMD.ATTRIBUTE15, STMD.DEMAND_TYPE, STMD.DUPLICATED_CONFIG_ITEM_ID, STMD.DUPLICATED_CONFIG_DEMAND_ID, 
 STMD.EXPLOSION_GROUP_ID, STMD.ORDERED_ITEM_ID, STMD.CONFIG_GROUP_ID, STMD.OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, 
 STMD.N_COLUMN1, STMD.GES_UPDATE_DATE, STMD.GLOBAL_NAME, STMD.BATCH_ID, STMD.CREATE_DATETIME, 
 STMD.ACTION_CODE,
 'RI' EXCETION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_DEMAND STMD WHERE
 NOT EXISTS(
	SELECT 1 
	FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  NSLO ,
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ECXOOL
WHERE ECXOOL.LINE_ID = STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE
AND ECXOOL.GLOBAL_NAME = STMD.GLOBAL_NAME
 AND COALESCE(ECXOOL.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID, ECXOOL.LINE_ID)=NSLO.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
  AND  (CASE WHEN ECXOOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN 'QTC'
   WHEN ECXOOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN 'BV' ELSE 'CG' END) = NSLO.SS_CODE /* Added ELSE 'CG' As part of SC LSS Q3FY14*/
 )
